title: Spud's Shop (Fork)
description: A simple and decorative shop mod, NeoForge 1.21.1 fork of Spudacious5705's original mod.
body:
##  **A decorative and versatile shop mod with an unrestrictive UI.**

![shop_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sHFbDnFN/images/c7adec4433eb9a40751d7a771f45c9eb49c902c1.png)
Spud's shops introduce a streamlined economy to your world.
Use shops to sell or buy stuff

- Buy & Sell Blocks: Craft your own shop blocks. Simply place the item you want to sell in the slot, set the price, and you are open for business.

- Secure Storage: Shop blocks are protected, only the owner and allowed player can access the inventory or profits.


This is a fork of the original mod made by Spudacious5705 for NeoForge 1.21.1.
Please consider visit also the original mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/spuds-shops).
